EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created a backup of the object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to create a backup of the object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.host}
